News

On this page you can find links to Wera Hobhouse’s work representing the people of Bath both locally and nationally, in Parliament.

All (26)Bath (3)Climate & Nature (5)Covert filming (1)eating diosrders (1)Hong Kong (2)misogyny (1)Parliament (7)Social media (2)Spice laced vapes (1)violence against women (1)wera hobhouse (6)Wera in Action (11)Wera's Bills (2)
  • Wera in action

Make Misogyny a Hate Crime

Violence against women and girls is growing, making misogyny a hate crime would be an important step to tackling this. When in opposition, Labour pledged to make misogyny a hate crime. Now they’re in power, they have gone silent and…

Read MoreMake Misogyny a Hate Crime
  • Wera in action

Crack Down on Covert Filming

Women are being secretly filmed on nights out – often from low, suggestive angles when they are wearing skirts – with these videos then uploaded online, where they attract large volumes of misogynistic abuse and degrading comments. Videos of this…

Read MoreCrack Down on Covert Filming
  • Wera in action

Energy Security Means Investing in Renewables

Trump’s war on Iran has sent global oil and gas prices spiralling, hitting already struggling households and businesses hard. It has clearly exposed the absurdity of backing fossil fuels over renewables. Our reliance on oil and gas is risking our…

Read MoreEnergy Security Means Investing in Renewables
  • Wera in action

Stopping Social Media Drug Sales

Children are buying vapes laced with the dangerous drug spice through social media platforms. I have been campaigning for tech companies to be held accountable and made to put an end to this online drug dealing. In Parliament, I argued…

Read MoreStopping Social Media Drug Sales
  • Wera in action

Challenging China’s Aggression

In Parliament I pushed for the government to sanction those responsible for targeting pro- democracy Hong Kong campaigners living in the UK. Hong Kong authorities have issued bounties of HK$1 million (around £100,000) for information leading to the arrest of…

Read MoreChallenging China’s Aggression
  • Wera in action

Preventing Eating Disorder Deaths

Far too many lives are being lost to eating disorders. These could, and should have been avoided with better early intervention and proper care. The true scale of this crisis remains hidden with eating disorder related deaths often mis-recorded or…

Read MorePreventing Eating Disorder Deaths
  • Wera in action

Bath’s New SEND School

In Parliament, I called on the Government to urgently release the frozen funding for Bath’s new special school. Parents of children with special educational needs are crying out for special school places across Bath. Funding to build a brand new…

Read MoreBath’s New SEND School
  • Wera in action

Tackling Online Abuse Against Women

Technology and social media  platforms are enabling new avenues to harass and abuse women online. In Parliament I urged action to fight this. New technology and online platforms are increasingly being used to harm, abuse, and harass women. This has…

Read MoreTackling Online Abuse Against Women
  • Wera in action

Standing Up To Trump

I called on the Government to call out Trump’s bullying and threatening behaviour towards the UK and EU over Greenland. Trump’s use of tariff threats to intimidate other countries into handing control of Greenland to the US is wholly unacceptable.…

Read MoreStanding Up To Trump
1 2 3Next
No more posts to load

Wera Hobhouse has been the Liberal Democrat Member of Parliament for Bath since 2017. Wera introduced the Upskirting and Workers Protection Bills. Both have now passed into law. Since 2024 she has been on the Energy Security and Net Zero Select Committee, Chair of the Eating Disorders All Party Parliamentary Group (APPG) and Vice Chair of the Europe APPG.
